subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Be not grieved by that which hath befallen the Luminary of the horizons. Verily, the sun shall be eclipsed and the moon darkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الله لاتحزنوا عما ورد علی نیر الافاق و ان الشمس یکسف و القمر یخسف
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @predictions and prophecies, @Manifestation of God as sun, @consolation and comfort
